With a 50MP photo resolution and 4K UHD video recording (4096 × 2160 pixels), it delivers crisp images and detailed videos. Thanks to the night vision camera technology with 2 powerful IR LEDs, the camera captures clear images even in complete darkness. This animal camera is particularly suitable for outdoor use. As a rugged wildlife camera with IP65 certification, it can withstand rain, dust and extreme temperatures. It is stored on a microSD card (up to 256 GB, not included). With 8 x AA batteries (not included), the camera stays ready for a long time. Alternatively, it can also be used as a wildlife camera with battery when rechargeable AA batteries are used. Whether as a surveillance camera with recording, wildlife camera or for securing forest areas and property - the Denver WCT-8016 impresses with its performance and reliability. The wildlife camera with mobile phone transfer stores recordings directly to a memory card, so they can be easily transferred later. In addition, the wildlife camera with motion sensor mobile phone offers fast and efficient detection of movements for precise recordings. This night vision camera delivers detailed shots even at night or in low light conditions thanks to its infrared technology. This means that animals and movements can be reliably detected around the clock. Note: This camera is not a wildlife camera with mobile phone transfer app, no wildlife camera WiFi and no wildlife camera with SIM. The data transfer takes place exclusively via the memory card.

items.title: Krytox gpl 105
items.description: Krytox GPL 105 - 10 grams net weight in handy dropper bottle. High performance PPPE anti-squeak oil for the automotive industry. Krytox GPL oils are based on perfluoropolyethers (PFPE) and provide superior stability, lubricity, viscosity and value. Krytox GPL 105 is a high performance, fully fluorinated oil that provides superior lubrication in a wide temperature range and unmatched chemical resistance. The inert nature of Krytox ensures it lasts longer than other chemical substances such as silicone and carbon-based lubricants. This unique base oil is 100% non-flammable and does not support combustion, even in environments with 100% liquid or gaseous oxygen. The applied lubricant does not migrate and is ideal for automotive applications, especially for eliminating NVH (noise, vibration and hardness). The industry standard recommended Krytox grade for squeak and rattle protection is GPL 105 as recommended by VW Group including Audi, Skoda and Seat, Plus, Land Rover etc. Important considerations before use: the surface for application must be clean before application. by Krytox. GPL 105 - Free from body wax, silicone etc. methylated spirits as a solvent can be used before application to achieve this. - The application amounts should be minimal, resist the temptation to apply excessively. Be aware of impurities in unwanted areas such as glass and paint as they are very difficult to remove.
about_product: Anti Squeak,Anti Crank,Rubber Gaskets
Eliminates squeaking and creaking in automotive applications
Non-flammable, non-flammable, BAM certified, NSF H1 certified
1:1 replacement part for Volkswagen VW / Seat / Skoda / Audi G052172A1
Viscosity of 160 cST at 40 °C

items.description:
The Frosal replacement wheel 260 x 75 mm is the optimal choice for handcarts, sack trucks, garden trolleys and transport carts where reliability and freedom from maintenance are required. 
Thanks to the robust steel rim and the puncture-proof PU foam tyres, the wheel is durable, dimensionally stable and completely airless - no flat foot, no pumping, no air loss. With a wheel height of approx. 260 mm, a tyre width of 75 mm and a centric hub (diameter 25 mm, 75 mm length), the wheel fits many common axle systems.

PU wheels are maintenance-free, quiet and very durable. 
If the wheel stands for a long time in heat or high continuous load, small pressure points can occur - this is typical of the material and not a product defect. 
Such areas can usually be heated by short heating (e.g. with hot water). Tip: 
For use with permanent standing load, such as For boat trailers, we recommend our pneumatic tyre models. Variants: 
Available as a set of 1, 2 or 4 - ideal for retrofitting or for the complete replacement of existing wheels.

Thanks to the unique, completely revised design, not only is installation easier, the innovative heat dissipation via the front also ensures ice-free headlights in cooler temperatures. Extensive tests in cooperation with TÜV Rheinland have confirmed the high performance of the Philips Ultinon Pro6000 Boost LED and enabled the final road approval by the Federal Motor Transport Authority (KBA). The approval was granted according to §22a StVZO in the form of a general type approval (ABG) for use in selected vehicle models. *Philips Ultinon Pro6000 Boost LED is approved for road traffic in Germany, Austria and many other selected European countries and only for selected vehicle models. Please download the registration document (ABG) and carry it with you in your vehicle. For more information visit philips.com/roadlegalled. **Compared to the legal minimum standard for halogen lamps. ***Applies only to manufacturing defects and for non-commercial use. The Philips SafeBeam technology ensures optimised light resistance and the optimal, glare-free light distribution on the road for your safest ride yet.

With an optimal light colour of 5,800 Kelvin, the Philips Ultinon Pro6000 Boost Moto LED produces a particularly white, high-contrast light with which you can see road signs and obstacles much earlier and prevents premature eye fatigue.

The Philips AirBoost technology optimally dissipates heat from the LED lamp and allows a service life of up to 3,000 hours, approx. Six times longer than a conventional halogen bulb. items.description:
Safety Fix 2 i-Size is a car seat for children from 76 to 150 cm height (approx. 9 months to 12 years). The car seat complies with the latest R129 i-Size standard and has successfully passed the crash tests. It is a secure car seat that is attached with the Isofix system and the Top Tether strap. The green indicators inform you of the correct installation. If they glow red, install the child seat again. The car seat has special safety systems. H-Guard system: this is a three-layer reinforced headrest with memory foam, and side protect system - wide, high side protection elements. The structure of the car seat absorbs the energy generated during an impact and does not transfer it to the child, protecting the child's cervical spine, hips and shoulders. Safety Fix 2 i-Size is equipped with practical solutions that increase the comfort of use. Thanks to the Easy Grow System, you can adjust the headrest simultaneously with the seat belt by choosing one of 12 positions. And if you want to buckle your child with the seat belt, you can store the internal seat belt without having to remove it from the car seat. Thanks to the elastic straps attached to the seat belt, you can simply slide it to the side and put the child in the car seat without the belt tangling under the child's buttocks.

Cover: Polyester.
Shell: PP (polypropylene).

Dimensions: 60.5-82.5 x 44 x 49 cm (height, width, depth).
Weight: 7.75 kg.

items.title: Kinderkraft I-SPARK I-SIZE Baby Car Seat, Group 2/3, 100-150 cm, From 3.5 To 12 Years, 15 to 36 Kg, Light (4.5 Kg), 3-point Seat Belt, Side Protection, Black
items.description:
I-SPARK i-Size is a 2-in-1 child seat for children with a height of 100-150 cm (from approx. 3.5 to 12 years / 15-36 kg), which is compliant with the latest i-Size safety standard R129. With the 3-point car belt, the installation of the child seat is quick and easy. It is a lightweight child seat (4.5 kg) that can be easily carried from one car to another. You can easily adjust the I-SPARK i-Size backrest to the car seat - the child seat will fit snugly to the car seat, which increases driving safety. 

I-SPARK i-Size effectively protects your child while driving. It has been tested very precisely under very strict conditions, including frontal and side collisions with a speed increase of up to 28%. Tests carried out at higher speeds allow a more accurate test of the breaking strength of the shell (including cracking) as it acts on it by 50% higher kinetic energy. 

The child seat has a reinforced, 3-layer headrest with the H-Guard system. Additional layers located in the headrest distribute the force acting on the child. They dissipate the energy generated in the event of an impact and thus protect the child's head and neck. The headrest can be adjusted with one hand and comfortably adjusted in 10 levels. The I-SPARK i-Size child seat is also equipped with the SPS, a reinforced side protection that absorbs the energy generated in a collision. It effectively protects the shoulders and spine of the child. 

The seat of the child seat is covered with soft material. You can remove and wash the cover at any time. In addition, the seat has comfortable armrests and the seat itself is large, so that even a larger child can sit in it without any problems. 

* The seat can be used without backrest as a booster seat for older children with a height of 140-150 cm. If your child already feels uncomfortable in the child seat, but the car belt does not yet run over the shoulder and chest centre, simply remove the backrest and use only the seat. It has been tested and ensures safety for the child. 

Craftsmanship: 
Material: Shell: Polypropylene (HDPE); Cover: Polyester
about_product: ✅ FOR CHILDREN FROM 3.5 TO 12 YEARS: A child seat for children with a height of 100-150 cm (15-36 kg). It is universal: it is installed with the 3-point car belt. This child seat can also be used without a backrest as a booster seat for larger children between 140 and 150 cm height*. I-SPARK i-Size is lightweight (4.5 kg) and can therefore be easily carried from one car to another.

I-SIZE: Complies with the latest i-Size safety standard R129. The certification according to the latest standards states that the child seat is safe and complies with the latest standards. The child seat has been tested under strict conditions in side and frontal collisions.

Safe: the child seat is equipped with special safety systems (SPS, H-GUARD) that protect the child comprehensively. SPS, a reinforced side protection, protects the shoulders and hips of the child. H-GUARD, a 3-layer headrest, absorbs the energy generated upon impact. The headrest is adjustable in 10 levels - you can adjust it with one hand.
Universal: the installation with the 3-point car belt is quick and easy. You can install the child seat in any car, even in older models without ISOFIX.

✅ COMFORTABLE: The child seat has a wide, soft seat - your child will have a comfortable ride on both shorter and longer trips. It is also equipped with an ergonomic backrest and the cover can be removed and washed.

items.title: Michelin tyre sealant 500 ml
items.description: Product Description               Hardly anything is more annoying than a puncture, especially on the way to holiday or on an important date. Then attaching the spare tyre independently is not a great experience in rain, cold and under time pressure. The MICHELIN tyre foam is the reliable roadside aid for on the go, without disassembly. Thanks to the exclusive MICHELIN formula, the puncture spray fills your flat tyres in a flash without changing tyres and additional tools. The tyre sealant consists only of a spray bottle that contains the actual filling foam. Application: puncture spray car. Use the MICHELIN tyre sealant exclusively on cars, trailers, small SUVs and caravans. Not suitable for filling tyres of bicycles, pushchairs, wheelbarrows, e-scooters or balls. The MICHELIN tyre sealant is recommended for car tyres with a tyre width up to and including 245 mm. Move the car so that the valve is at the medium height of the tyre. Do not remove the item that caused the puncture. Shake the puncture spray. Screw the hose nozzle onto the tyre valve. Remove the lid of the tyre seal sealant and press the push button while holding the puncture spray in a vertical position. Do not exceed the speed of 40 km/h on the first 3 kilometres, then not faster than 80 km/h. MICHELIN is committed to providing customers with high-quality products and satisfying the needs of all customers. To achieve this, MICHELIN spends a lot of time on the development and design of the products. Therefore the MICHELIN puncture spray shines in a new design.                  Ingredients               Distilled water, latex, ethylene glycol, corrosion inhibitor and propane-butane propellant
about_product: Lightning-fast tyre repair: the MICHELIN puncture spray closes even larger holes quickly and reliably due to puncture injuries - for a safe ride after a puncture.
Easy to use without tools: simply attach the hose to the tyre valve and spray. The tyre sealant seals the hole and inflates the tyre at the same time - no tyre change necessary.

Clean and safe: no dirt, no tough lubricating layer. The spray does not damage the tyre and is compatible with TPMS systems (tyre pressure monitoring system). Practical roadside aid for cars, SUVs and caravans.
Innovative formula: thanks to thermal and chemical processes, the inner pressure of the tyre increases at every wheel turn. A journey at up to 80 km/h is possible without any problems and safely.
MICHELIN Quality – Motion for life: For over 130 years, MICHELIN has stood for innovation and reliability. Designed for quick roadside assistance and sustainable mobility - trust MICHELIN.

items.title: Guardian Bell Biker Bell, Motorcycle Bell Lucky Charm, Stainless Steel Motorcycle Bell, Protective Bell Angel Riding Bell, Motorcycle Bell Keyring for Blessing the Peace
items.description:
The Guardian Bell, also known as the Gremlin Bell or Spirit Bell, is a distinctive element in the world of motorcycle sports. These little bells attached to the bottom of the frame of many motorcycles are much more than just an ornament. 

The Guardian Bell has its roots in a legend about evil spirits, so-called goblins, lurking on the streets. Legend has it that these goblins are always looking for motorcyclists to cling to and cause unusual problems, especially in the field of the engine or electrical systems. The guardian bell is designed to protect bikers from these ghosts on their rides. 

Legend has it that the bell works by capturing the ghosts in its sound cave. The constant ringing of the bell makes them angry until they get exhausted from their clutch and return to the road. In this way, the bell protects the rider from the trouble caused by the gremlins. 

However, in order for the Gremlin bell to develop its effect, some "rules" must be observed. First of all, the bell must not be purchased by the biker who uses it. For it to work, it must be given to the biker by a loved one. It also needs to be attached to the bottom of the frame so that it is the first thing the goblins find when trying to hold onto the motorcycle. 

Another important aspect of the Guardian Bell is its symbolic meaning. The bell is not only a form of protection from evil spirits on the road, but also a symbol of friendship and brotherhood among bikers. When a bell is donated, it is a gesture of kindness and a desire for safety in road traffic. It's a way of saying to the recipient, "I care about you and hope you're always safe on the road". 

In summary, the Guardian Bell is more than just a jewel for a motorcycle. It is a strong symbol of protection, friendship and brotherhood in the motorcycle world. Whether you believe in the legend of the goblins of the road or not, with a Guardian Bell on your motorcycle you can carry a piece of this rich culture with you every time you swing on the saddle.
about_product: Quality and exquisiteness: our guardian bell decorated with 3D reliefs is exquisite. Once you have it, you will fall in love with the bell. The motorcycle bell lucky charm retains its shape and colour even after many rides in different weather conditions and can withstand the rigors of open road and long rides.

Guardian Angel: With a loud, clear and pleasant sound. Hang this guardian bell on the lowest part of your motorcycle. Gremlins will be in their cavity motorcycles when they try to reach your bike. And hang them forward, because the jingle drives them away. They are a strong symbol of protection and happiness that repels evil spirits and brings positive energy to the wearer.

A MUST FOR HAPPINESS - It is said to repel evil spirits and street goblins, protect the rider and bring him safely through the streets. When you buy this bell for yourself, the magic works. If you receive it, the protective power is doubled.

GREAT GIFT A wonderful gift for friends, family and motorcyclists. Protect your loved one with our biker guardian angel bell. No one will refuse to like such a gift with good will and care. The bell with good detail will impress your loved ones. An excellent choice for a birthday or Christmas gift.

Package Content: You will receive a motorcycle bell, a fine cloth bag. Our bell not only fits motorcycles and bicycles, but also car key fobs, bringing a touch of happiness and personality to your vehicle.

items.description:
Why choose this tactical backpack? We took the classic military backpack design as a starting point, then we tested, upgraded and improved until we were satisfied that we developed the best fitness and outdoor backpack. Today, outdoor explorers and athletes trust it. 


The military backpack takes everything you throw at it. Made of durable high density polyester, waterproof and tear-resistant, with plenty of pockets for all your gear. 

45 L capacity with multiple compartments, pockets and zip pockets.

Dedicated laptop/device compartment (up to 43.2 cm) 

MOLLE design and system with front and side fabric for additional attachments

The backpack opens flat to 180 degrees for easy packing and unpacking

Velcro strips for adding a patch (all backpacks come with standard USA patches that can be removed) 

Waterproof and tear-resistant.

about_product: The room you need: This military tactical backpack has a size of approx. 40 cm x 25 cm x 25 cm and a reasonable capacity of 25 litres. This backpack can hold all your essential gear. A large surface of Velcro makes the backpack different from other backpacks. You can stick any badge to it that you like.

Robust and waterproof: The military standard backpack is made of 900D polyester material and is reinforced and double stitched at all stress points. It is durable and robust, and our special coating makes our training backpack both water-repellent and scratch-resistant.

Modular MOLLE construction: The laser cut MOLLE webbing design makes this tactical backpack special. It uses a two-layer fabric laser cutting MOLLE suspension system to allow the attachment of all kinds of tactical bags. It is designed to be used in combination with other equipment. Advanced features (for select vehicles, see image 3 for details): When used with more professional apps (usually requires a separate purchase), you can get advanced features such as advanced diagnostics* (ABS, airbag, chassis control, etc.) and manufacturer-specific PIDs (such as transmission temperature, oil pressure), inspect the HV battery in hybrid and electric vehicles, adjust selected vehicles, etc. *To check whether your vehicle is compatible with the advanced diagnostics, please see the fourth picture on the product page. Note: The oil service light cannot be reset.

Device compatibility: Compatible with iOS via Bluetooth LE (do not pair the device in iOS Bluetooth settings; please connect directly in the respective OBD2 app), and with Android devices via classic Bluetooth (head unit compatibility not always ensured). Detailed instructions for connecting and troubleshooting for iOS and Android can be found in the fifth product image or user manual.

Vehicle compatibility: Compatible with petrol vehicles from model year 2001 and diesel vehicles from model year 2004 in the EU and UK (only for basic functions; advanced features are only available for select vehicles via advanced apps). For plug-in hybrid and electric vehicles, please check the Car Scanner ELM OBDII app and check if there are suitable EV connection profiles or if there are other apps specially designed for electric vehicles.

Important note: Not compatible with pre-2008 or G-series models when used with BimmerCode or BimmerLink. Currently, no Veepeak app is included with this device; third-party apps are required but not included and must be downloaded separately or purchased from the Play Store or App Store (depending on vehicle and requirements); not compatible with Carly, MHD, xHP, ProTool apps.

items.description:
Bitte messen Sie vor der Bestellung die Maße Ihres Sitzes. Unser universeller Rücksitzbezug ist 45 cm breit und 135 cm lang, wodurch er für die meisten mittelgroßen SUVs, LKWs und Limousinen geeignet ist. 
Verabschieden Sie sich von billigen Sitzbezügen, die Ihre Sitze nach einmaligem Gebrauch ruinieren. Und vergessen Sie die übermäßig teuren Optionen, die Ihre Tasche verletzen. Unser praktischer und erschwinglicher Hunde-Autositzbezug wurde entwickelt, um Ihren Bedürfnissen gerecht zu werden. 
Wir widmen uns einer gründlichen Forschung zu Hundeautositzbezügen, um sicherzustellen, dass Sie und Ihre pelzigen Freunde ein überlegenes Reiseerlebnis genießen können. 
Wir präsentieren Ihnen unseren zuverlässigen Rücksitzbezug für Hunde, der ein außergewöhnliches Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis bietet: 
1. Gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis: aus wasserdichtem Stoff und wasserdichtem Polypropylen mit Baumwolle. Unser Sitzbezug hat ein 4-lagiges Design. Es hat sogar einen glänzenden Stoff, der bei Sonnenlicht einen Hauch von Stil verleiht. 
2. Langlebig: Hergestellt aus strapazierfähigem Oxford-Gewebe, dieser Bezug ist resistent gegen große Hunde und garantiert eine lange Nutzung. 
3. Sicherheit: Die rutschfeste Mesh-Rückseite und die offenen Reißverschlüsse des Sicherheitsgurts bieten zusätzliche Sicherheitsmaßnahmen. Es hat sogar einen einfach zu bedienenden Sicherheitsschlitz für Kinder. 
4. Graue Passform: Die graue Farbe unseres Sitzbezugs ist vielseitig und vervollständigt den Innenraum der meisten Autos. 
Passend für: 
1. Größe: Unser Sitzbezug ist groß genug, um auf die meisten Rücksitze des Autos zu passen, bietet vollständige Abdeckung und Schutz. 
2. Einfache Installation und Lagerung: Die Installation unseres Sitzbezugs ist sehr einfach und wird mit langen Gurten geliefert, die sicher an der Kopfstütze befestigt werden können. Es kann auch leicht verstaut werden, wenn er nicht in Gebrauch ist. 
3. Leicht zu reinigendes Antihaft-Leder: Die Reinigung ist einfach mit unserem Antihaft-Leder-Design. Verwenden Sie einfach einen Staubsauger oder reinigen Sie ihn für eine schnelle Reinigung. 
Investieren Sie mit Vertrauen in unseren Hundesitzbezug, da er sich Ihren Bedürfnissen anpasst und den Komfort und die Sicherheit Ihres geliebten Haustieres auf Reisen gewährleistet.
about_product: 🐶【1. Verbesserte Sicherheit: Sorgen Sie für ein sicheres und sorgenfreies Fahrerlebnis mit unserem zuverlässigen und langlebigen Hunde-Autositzbezug. Ihr pelziger Freund bleibt während der Fahrt sicher an Ort und Stelle, sodass Sie sich auf die Straße konzentrieren und eine angenehme gemeinsame Reise genießen können.

🐶【3. Wassernachweis und Kratzer,Bling Bling im Sonnenlicht】:Mit diesem strapazierfähigen hundedecke auto rücksitz keine Sorgen mehr in der Zukunft. 🐶【 4. Multifunktionale Anwendung】: Hund Rücksitz-Hängematte für Kinder Passend und Haustiere, Sofa Sitzschutz für Hunde, wasserdicht, Sctrathproof, Anti-Slip.Solid für Hunde Abbruch Ihr Auto.

Preparation: 1. Unscrew the thinner end of the plug. 2. Unscrew the middle part of the plug. 3. Remove the plug part from the housing. 4. Now there are 6 individual parts in the following order (from left to right): end part with logo, component with contact pins, screw connection, sealing ring, strain relief, end nut

Use: 1. Pull through harness in this order: nut, strain relief, gasket and screw connection. 2. Insert component into the template with contact pins so that you can see the screws and the stencil print. 3. Insert all cables into the respective screw terminals of the connector according to the template labelling and screw them tightly. 4. Remove the template and insert component into the end part (nose on nose). Assemble all parts in reverse order.

Specifications: 
Material: plastic and brass. 
Voltage: 12 V DC. 

Package includes: 
1 x 13-pin trailer plug. 

Wiring Configuration: 
Pin 1 - Yellow Wire (Left Indicator) 
Pin 2 - Blue Wire (Fog Light) 
Pin 3 - White Wire (Ground Cable) 
Pin 4 - Green Wire (Right Indicator) 
Pin 5 - Brown Wire (Right Rear / Side Light) 
Pin 6 - Red Wire (Brake/Brake Lights) 
Pin 7 - Black Wire (Left Rear / Side Light) 
Pin 8 - Pink Wire (Reversing Light) 
Pin 9 - orange wire (12 V continuous current from the battery). 
Pin 10 - grey wire (12 V ignition on battery charge or refrigerator). 
Pin 11 - White/Black Wire (Earth for Terminal 10) 
Pin 12 - white/blue wire (usually not used). 
Pin 13 - White/Red Wire (Earth for Terminal 9)

Protection: thanks to a clamping lock lined with a webbing, the mini lashing strap protects your bicycles or your load on the trailer or roof rack.
Features: The fastening straps have a bevelled strap end, which makes it easier to thread into the quick release. The rolled fastening strap can be held together.
Details: the lashing straps are 35 cm short and 19 mm wide. The bicycle strap is made of durable polyester.

Instructions: 1. Insert strap end without twisting from below. | 2. Tension straps by pulling and lashing. 3. Important: do not lift up, just tighten and do not strain over the permissible tensile force.
